title: Oaks UI Dark Rework
description: 🌕  A dark mode version rework of Oaks UI Rework🌕
body:
![A showcase of light mode UI elements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d896b29d6f64ded25de1d03ae204ea04ed8a2d6.png)

**Want [Light Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oaks-ui-rework/)?**  

# Oaks UI Reworks' Dark Mode Resource Pack Java Edition
Oaks UI Rework aims to modernise the vanilla Minecraft look whilst still keeping it within ruining the vanilla feel. Inspired by Leaked Ore UI

## Supports
Java Edition 1.21+

### Mods
- [Oaks Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/oaks-delight)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
